colors.primary_description: Navy Blue - Use for text, headers, and primary structural elements.
colors.secondary_description: Light Green - Use for primary actions, success states, and key highlights.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and containers. gap-8 for lists.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Center alignment for the main public search hero. Left alignment for search results and tables for readability.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Subtle borders (border border-slate-200), minimal border radius (rounded-md or rounded-lg).

components.search_bar: Large, prominent, clean. border-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 rounded-lg p-4 text-lg w-full shadow-sm.
components.search_results_list: Loose spacing (gap-6), clean list layout. Text links highly readable, text-slate-900 hover:text-green-500 transition-colors.
components.pdf_viewer: Minimalist inline viewer. border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-slate-50. Include high-contrast 'Download PDF' button nearby.
components.admin_login_button: Small, neat, top-right corner. variant='outline' or clean text button.
components.admin_dashboard_table: Simple Shadcn table. border-b for rows, plenty of padding (py-4). Delete button must be a distinct red (bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600).
components.upload_form: Compact layout. Shadcn forms, Select, stylized drag-and-drop zone (border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-lg p-12 text-center hover:bg-slate-50).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons darken slightly on hover. Search results get a subtle color shift.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for all interactive elements.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-400 focus:outline-none to ensure accessibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY .js files (no .tsx). Configure components accordingly.
Ensure the entire app uses Tailwind classes corresponding to the color palette.
The public page must NOT have a sidebar, just a clean centered layout.
Implement the PDF Viewer inline. Ensure it renders within the same page.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='download-btn', data-testid='delete-btn').
Admin routes should be protected. Form should use Shadcn Select and simple input.
No illustrations or complex graphics. Rely solely on typography, space, and simple geometry.
